title: × catanellia werdermannii
intro: × Catanellia werdermannii, also known as Catanella werdermannii, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. × Catanellia werdermannii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
